season_standings.source_notes: KCRSCCA year-end solo championship points, filtered to OIO drivers and family. Source: kcrscca.org/results/solo/{year}/. 'trophy' = T-suffix position in source (trophy-earning finish). 2015-2017 source pages returned 404. 2020 = COVID season, no championship held. 2023 = no OIO drivers appeared in standings.

2015.notes: Championship standings page returned 404. Data not recoverable.

2016.notes: Championship standings page returned 404. Data not recoverable.

2017.notes: Championship standings page returned 404. Data not recoverable.

2018.notes: 9 events (E1, E2, E4-E10 — no E3 listed).

2020.notes: COVID season — limited or no events held, no year-end championship standings published.

2023.notes: Standings page loaded successfully. No OIO drivers appeared in the championship points.

2024.notes: Ian Jennings did not appear in 2024 championship standings.

events.title: KCRX Event 3
events.notes: 17 runs. Cone adjustment: 0sec per system (using 2sec/cone per OIO rule for fastest_run calc). Miles Smith DSQ on runs 11-17 (heat 2). Ian had Best Raw Time of Day overall.

results.notes: 1T of 5 in MR. CLASS WIN + Best Raw Time of Day overall.
5 of 5 in MR. DSQ on runs 11-17 (heat 2). Fastest run from clean runs 1-10 only.

events.notes: Ian Jennings DNF on run 7 (did not take last run). Pronto official display shows Ian 1st with 318.321 (6 runs). DNF penalty = slowest MR run 7 time (Andrew Moll, 65.463s) + 10s = 75.463 added → corrected total 393.784, corrected position 7th. Modified Best Time of Day in official display belongs to Larry g Smith (370.630) after correction.

runs.dnf_reason: Did not take run — car failure

season_standings.source_notes: KCRSCCA championship points pages. 'trophy' field = physical trophy awarded (T suffix on original standings). Years 2017, 2019, 2020, 2022 standings pages were not available.

2025.notes: Year End standings. 8 events counted (E1-E3, E6-E10), 2 drops applied. E4/E5 not counted.

2023.notes: Year End standings (Jan 20 2024). 5 events counted, 1 drop applied.

2022.notes: Championship standings page not found. Multiple URL patterns attempted, all 404.

2021.notes: Year End standings (Dec 9 2021). 8 scoring events: E3, E5, E7, E8, E9, E10, E12, E13.

2020.notes: Championship standings page not found. Multiple URL patterns attempted, all 404.

2019.notes: Championship standings page not found. Multiple URL patterns attempted, all 404.

2018.notes: 6 scoring events: E2, E3, E4, E6, E7, E8.
